name: Zeke's Convergence

passives.name: Frostfire Tempest
passives.effects: Upon casting your ultimate ability, you summon a storm of flame and ice around you for 5 seconds, dealing{{ft|{{as|{{ap|30/4}} magic damage}} every {{fd|0.25}} seconds|{{as|{{ap|30*5}} '''total''' magic damage}} over the duration}}to enemies within {{tip|cr|icononly=true}} 350 units and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 30% (45 second cooldown, starts on ultimate cast).

effects_structured.raw: On ultimate cast, summon a storm for 5s that deals 7.5 magic damage every 0.25s (150 total) to enemy champions within 350 units (45s cooldown starts on ultimate cast).
Enemies in the storm are slowed by 30% while it persists.

simpleDescription: Grants you and your ally bonuses when you cast your ultimate.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Frostfire Tempest begins on ultimate cast, ticks every 0.25 seconds for 5 seconds around the owner (350-unit centered radius), and only affects enemy champions.
Player-visible behavior: storm damage is 7.5 magic damage per tick (150 total over 5 seconds) with a 30% slow during storm uptime; cooldown starts at ultimate cast.
